description: Use this tool only when you need data that contacts_get_summary does not provide. Prefer contacts_get_summary whenever possible. When using this tool, use its pagination feature to retrieve all required pages.

partnerClientCode.description: Optional partner client code to call APIs on behalf of a specific partner office/sub-client. Only use when explicitly requested by the user.

pageSize.description: Number of contacts per page (default: 10). Use pagination to retrieve all required pages.

pageNum.description: Page number to retrieve (default: 1). Use pagination to iterate through all required pages.

contacts.description: Array of full contact objects as returned by the Textellent API. Use contacts_get_summary when you only need a minimal listing (id, name, phone, pagination).

items.description: Full contact data (all fields currently provided by the Textellent contacts API). The exact shape may evolve over time.

totalCount.description: Total number of contacts available across all pages
